bio: Hi! I'm Lohith, a Python developer specializing in Django, FastAPI, and LLM-powered agentic AI systems. I build scalable backend services and intelligent applications that solve real-world problems.
My experience spans RESTful APIs, AI chatbots, and agentic workflows. I focus on clean architecture, high-quality code, and leveraging LLMs to create impactful solutions.
When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring the latest in AI and agent frameworks, writing technical blog posts, or contributing to the Python and AI developer community.
